MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-23-2019 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON APR-15-2019 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WAS INVOLVED IN AN ACCIDENT AND IS NOT AVAILABLE FOR TRIAL. PARTIES' STIPULATION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED. THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO 4/15/19 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. STIPULATION AND ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER - STIPULATION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S UNAVAILABILITY AND ORDER

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR APR-15-2019 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT (CONTINUED) ON APR-18-2019 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. JOHN F. LEE, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ANTHONY REGNER, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL REPRESENTS TO THE COURT THAT HIS CLIENT HAD A STROKE AND WAS DISCHARGED ON 4/9/19. THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF TO FILE A DECLARATION UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY AUTHENTICATING THE MEDICAL DOCUMENT. THE DECLARATION SHOULD BE ELECTRONICALLY FILED BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON 4/16/19. PARTIES ARE ALSO ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER ON A TRIAL DATE CONTINUANCE AS LONG AS THE DOCUMENT IS AUTHENTICATED AND THEN THE COURT WILL FIND GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT WAIVES MR. REGNER'S APPEARANCE AND HIS CLIENTS ON 4/18/19. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-19-2019 - APPEARANCES BY JOHN LEE, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF SALVADOR GARZA; ANTHONY PROFFITT, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS KULDEEP KHAROUD, ALPHA TOWING AND RECOVERY LLC, BALJIT KHAROUD -- PLAINTIFF STATED NOT READY FOR TRIAL AND ORALLY REQUESTED TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT DENIED PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. DEFENDANTS' ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS CASE IS GRANTED. THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT ASKS TO PRESERVE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND SANCTIONS. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALPHA TOWING AND RECOVERY LLC's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint.

Alpha's motion for leave to file cross-complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The court will sign the proposed order but interlineate that Alpha must file and serve the cross-complaint by December 10, 2018. The court does not deem pleadings filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Deposition Attendance, And For Monetary Sanctions, Supporting Declaration Of John F. Lee, And Memo Of Points And Authorities (Ccp 2025.450 Et Seq.)
Off Calendar Jul-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John Lee, appering for Plaintiff Salvador Garza, Telephone 415-863-4336
No other appearance.

Ruling: The Court adopts the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SALVADOR GARZA'S Motion For Order Compelling Deposition Attendance, And For Monetary Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Deponents shall appear for depositions at a mutually agreed upon date no later than August 10, 2018. Sanctions denied as Plaintiff did not itemize the hours and work spent on the motion. Order is signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
